description: Response shape for GET /v1/audit/remediations/{run_id}. The result field carries an AuditRemediationRunResult (contracts.audit_remediation_run_result) — the flattened RemediationResult summary persisted after a remediation run. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class RemediationRunResponse.

run_id.description: UUID of the audit remediation run.

audit_run_id.description: UUID of the audit run that produced the findings this remediation consumed. Null if triggered without a specific source audit run.

mode.description: Remediation mode (e.g. 'auto', 'supervised'). Implementation-specific value from the run row.

write.description: Whether fixes were applied (true) or dry-run only (false). ADR-014.

requested_by.description: Username or agent identifier that triggered this run.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run was requested.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when execution began.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when execution completed.

result.description: AuditRemediationRunResult JSONB payload (contracts.audit_remediation_run_result). Present when status=completed|failed.
